blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,039 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 38".
